Entreprenørforeningen - Bygg og Anlegg (EBA)

https://www.eba.no/
Avvik: 121 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/01de20a85a8348e0bd28dd3cff66b801/260206_rotveilederen-3.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/0
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1647aac4928c47359d5a9d915ed1022c/2026-02-eba-byggenaringens-klimapris-web-1.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcs
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b59d7c118d0a4709ad6ef0af33c7a117/2026-02-byggenaringens-klimakonferanse-2026-web-11.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=3
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/artikler/2026/ny-veileder-for-rehabilitering-ombygging-og-tilbygg---rot-prosjekter/">Ny veileder for rehabilitering, ombygging og tilbygg - ROT-prosjekter<
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-oss/viktigste-saker-eba/dette-mener-entreprenorforeningen/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentasse
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/">NHO Byggenæringen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Medlemskap

https://www.eba.no/medlemskap/
Avvik: 97 | Bestått: 114
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Se vår brosjyre!</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--medium"> <i class="ph-light ph-question"></i> Spørsmål om medlemskap</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt!</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/contentassets/521e6d9f80b04860a2ae903a02adacc5/2025_oppdatert_eba_brosjyre_trykk_f31.pdf" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="/contentassets/521e6d9f80b04860a2ae903a02adacc5/2025_oppdatert_eba_brosjyre_trykk_f31.pdf" target="_blank"> <span>Last ned pdf</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-li
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Byggenæringens Landsforening (BNL)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nho.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon (NHO)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (87 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=144701&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

Entreprenørforeningen - Bygg og Anlegg (EBA)

https://www.eba.no/
Avvik: 121 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/01de20a85a8348e0bd28dd3cff66b801/260206_rotveilederen-3.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/0
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/1647aac4928c47359d5a9d915ed1022c/2026-02-eba-byggenaringens-klimapris-web-1.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcs
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b59d7c118d0a4709ad6ef0af33c7a117/2026-02-byggenaringens-klimakonferanse-2026-web-11.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=3
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/artikler/2026/ny-veileder-for-rehabilitering-ombygging-og-tilbygg---rot-prosjekter/">Ny veileder for rehabilitering, ombygging og tilbygg - ROT-prosjekter<
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-oss/viktigste-saker-eba/dette-mener-entreprenorforeningen/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentasse
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/">NHO Byggenæringen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nho.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="https://www.nho.no/">Næringslivets Hovedorganisasjon (NHO)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/artikler/2026/ny-veileder-for-rehabilitering-ombygging-og-tilbygg---rot-prosjekter/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/01de20a85a8

Link text is very long (113 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://cdm.eba.no/cn/atfel/pamelding"> <div class="block-entrance__icon"> <i class="ph-light ph-envelope"></i> </div> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/">NHO Byggenæringen</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/om-oss/eba-regionforeninger/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/b760d64a9f6543149cabe38e2e0d6e
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/om-oss/eba-regionforeninger/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://www.byggopp.no/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/9da02618ef724ee3928cd96b1deab882/kom

SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/vi-bygger-norge/"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=8&content.link=141844&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>

Styret

https://www.eba.no/om-oss/styret2/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 109
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="site-footer__column-heading"> Entreprenørforeningen - Bygg og Anlegg (EBA) </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=156635&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>

Fjellsikring

https://www.eba.no/fag-og-bransjeomrader/bransjeomrader/anlegg-og-infrastruktur/fjellsikring2/
Avvik: 98 | Bestått: 104
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>E-læringskurset "Sikker fjellsikring"</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://eba.muniolms.com/no/shop/eba/product/313" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentas
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Klikk her for å komme til kurset'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://eba.muniolms.com/no/shop/eba/product/313" target="_blank"> <span>Klikk her for å komme til kurset</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"><
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://eba.muniolms.com/no/shop/eba/product/313" target="_blank"> <span>Klikk her for å komme til kurset</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"><
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/artikler/2024/ny-veiledende-bransjestandard-for-fjellsikring/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/siteassets/
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Klikk her'

<a class="nho-button" href="/artikler/2024/ny-veiledende-bransjestandard-for-fjellsikring/"> <span>Klikk her</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=577054&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-comp__submitbtn" type="submit"> <span class="ph-light ph-magnifying-glass icon--large search-comp__submitbtn-icon"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="searc-input-header-mobile" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

SERIOUS

Om oss

https://www.eba.no/om-oss/
Avvik: 97 | Bestått: 106
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-chat-circle-dots"></i> Lurer du på noe? Ta gjerne kontakt!</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="http://www.fiec.eu/">http://www.fiec.eu/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="http://www.eapa.com/">http://www.eapa.com/</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nho.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">NHO</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"></span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">NHO Byggenæringen</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"></span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

<a href="/om-oss/arsrapporter/arsrapporten-2022/" target="_blank"> <div> <span class="block-links-item-title">Digital årsrapport</span> </div> <span class="ph-light ph-caret-right icon icon-link"></sp

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=144700&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>

Søk

https://www.eba.no/sok/?tag=Arrangement
Avvik: 101 | Bestått: 103
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-eba"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=9&content.link=141848&a
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="more" href="/eba-arrangementer/2026/entreprenordagen-2026/"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="block-meta-url" href="/eba-arrangementer/2026/entreprenordagen-2026/">https://www.eba.no/eba-arrangementer/2026/entreprenordagen-2026</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="more" href="/eba-arrangementer/2026/hms-konferansen-2026/"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="block-meta-url" href="/eba-arrangementer/2026/hms-konferansen-2026/">https://www.eba.no/eba-arrangementer/2026/hms-konferansen-2026</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=9&content.link=141848&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Veiledere, dokumenter og rapporter

https://www.eba.no/Dokumenter/
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 157
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary" href="/contentassets/5af18e63b4ce4266acb04d51086fa7c5/260206_rotveilederen.pdf" target="_blank">Se PDF</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary" href="/contentassets/b158a14abb3f4aa4ad4a2dc216506b0a/2025-03-eba-hms-sykefravar-veileder-og-definisjoner.pdf" target="_blank">Se PDF</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary" href="/contentassets/da87c187be4e48f8ad541348b55efd5e/25004-eba_samspillsveileder-for-rehabilitering-av-bygg_web93.pdf" target="_blank">Se PDF</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (100 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=38&content.link=701390&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Ansatte

https://www.eba.no/om-oss/ansatte/
Avvik: 90 | Bestått: 154
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Administrasjon</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'Administrasjon' appears 4 times

id="Administrasjon"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=156672&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Kurs og arrangement

https://www.eba.no/kurs/
Avvik: 10 | Bestått: 65
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="logo" src="/siteassets/bilder/logoer/eba-logo-uten-undertekst.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> Har du spørsmål om kurs? Ta gjerne kontakt!</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://eba.muniolms.com/no/shop/eba" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://eba.muniolms.com/no/shop/eba" target="_blank"> <span>Kjøp kurs</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/kurs/eba-kompetansehub/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/2319cec09e11456c886b9a029fe69601/eb
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://cdm.nho.no/nhono-atfel/pages/qdyjforieebbwbqvrcywq.html?PageId=7e233640c88aef11816f005056b718c1" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=37&content.link=581566&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Anlegg og infrastruktur

https://www.eba.no/fag-og-bransjeomrader/bransjeomrader/anlegg-og-infrastruktur/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 111
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Vei og jernbane</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Dette mener Entreprenørforeningen - Bygg og Anlegg (EBA)

https://www.eba.no/om-oss/viktigste-saker-eba/dette-mener-entreprenorforeningen/
Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 143
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="block-carousel-image" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/63da0c9a4ce94669a83cf8cf15890a4d/2025-eba-veikart-1.png?quality=100&width=290" srcset="/contentassets/63da0c9a4ce94669a8
Add descriptive alt text to the image

CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="block-carousel-image" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/63da0c9a4ce94669a83cf8cf15890a4d/2025-eba-veikart-2.png?quality=100&width=290" srcset="/contentassets/63da0c9a4ce94669a8

CRITICAL

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4>I bygg- og anleggsnæringen finnes mange av løsningene for en økonomisk, miljømessig og sosialt bærekraftig fremtid. </h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (11 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/strategi/veikart-for-bygg--og-anleggsnaringen-2024-2026.pdf" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)"
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/strategi/veikart-for-bygg--og-anleggsnaringen-2024-2026.pdf"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </s
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/Politikk/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/e4
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/Politikk/" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="nho-button" href="https://www.nhobyggenaringen.no/Politikk/" target="_blank"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (89 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=714911&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)

Presse

https://www.eba.no/om-oss/presse/
Avvik: 91 | Bestått: 108
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5 class="block-heading__heading block-heading__heading--regular"> <i class="ph-light ph-device-mobile"></i> Pressekontakter</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Last ned'

<a aria-label="Last ned" href="/contentassets/aa6258d790414014a4cd8e819e8cd525/eba_logo_positiv_rgb.png" target="_blank"> <img alt="EBA logo" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/aa6258d790414014a4cd8e8
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Last ned" href="/contentassets/aa6258d790414014a4cd8e819e8cd525/eba_logo_positiv_rgb.png" target="_blank"> <img alt="EBA logo" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/aa6258d790414014a4cd8e8
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=146142&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Tøm input" class="search-comp__clearsearch" type="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-x"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Søk" class="search-comp__submitbtn" type="submit"> <span class="ph-light ph-magnifying-glass icon--large search-comp__submitbtn-icon"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

<a class="menu-link" href="/veiledere2/samspill/"><span>Samspill</span></a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

EIV 2026

https://www.eba.no/Kalender/2026/arrangementer/entreprisedagen-i-vest-2026/
Avvik: 97 | Bestått: 105
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://maps.app.goo.gl/wK6xjQTq66mAbTW39" target="_blank"> Grand Hotel Terminus, Bergen </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="btn btn--primary event-info__signup" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nhobransje/events/eiv2026/register" target="_blank"> Meld deg på her!
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=1318&content.link=740029&content.category=1365,1373,1375,1851,1919,2663&content.type.cat
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Bygg og bolig

https://www.eba.no/fag-og-bransjeomrader/bransjeomrader/bygg/
Avvik: 96 | Bestått: 112
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/bilder/rapporter-og-publikasjoner/handlingsplan-2020.pdf" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/siteassets/bilder/rapporter-og-publikasjoner/handlingsplan-2020.pdf"> <span>Les mer</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/bygg-og-bolig/boligpolitikk-2020.pdf" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="nho-button" href="/siteassets/dokumenter/bygg-og-bolig/boligpolitikk-2020.pdf"> <span>Les mer </span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=35&content.link=156756&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>

Kurs- og arrangementskalender

https://www.eba.no/kurs/kurs--og-arrangementskalender/
Avvik: 26 | Bestått: 123
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="logo" src="/siteassets/bilder/logoer/eba-logo-uten-undertekst.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'fylke' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="checkbox__input" id="fylke-" name="fylke" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (19 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Slik får du tilgang til lukket medlemsinnhold

https://www.eba.no/medlemskap/innlogging-til-medlemssider/
Avvik: 93 | Bestått: 99
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h5

<h5><strong>Nyhetsbrev for medlemmer</strong></h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">chat</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">chat med oss på hverdager mellom 08.00 - 15.00</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

<a class="menu-link" href="/veiledere2/samspill/"><span>Samspill</span></a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Jernbane

https://www.eba.no/fag-og-bransjeomrader/bransjeomrader/anlegg-og-infrastruktur/jernbane/
Avvik: 92 | Bestått: 104
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h3> <span class="input-good"></span> <span class="input-bad"></span> </h3>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea class="block-feedback-textarea" data-required="" id="comment" name="comment"></textarea>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="block-feedback-email" data-error-empty="Vennligst legg inn din e-postadresse før du sender inn." data-error-invalid="Vennligst legg inn en gyldig e-postadresse." name="email" placeholder
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (85 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=33&content.link=169267&content.category=&content.type.category=1379&content.tags=" s
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Søk

https://www.eba.no/sok/?tag=Entreprisedagen%2Bi%2BVest%2B2026
Avvik: 99 | Bestått: 101
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-eba"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=9&content.link=141848&a
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="more" href="/Kalender/2026/arrangementer/entreprisedagen-i-vest-2026/"></a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a class="block-meta-url" href="/Kalender/2026/arrangementer/entreprisedagen-i-vest-2026/">https://www.eba.no/Kalender/2026/arrangementer/entreprisedagen-i-vest-2026</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="off" class="mousetrap" name="q" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="search"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=9&content.link=141848&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Om endringer i Teknisk Forskrift (TEK)

https://www.eba.no/artikler/2026/om-endringer-i-teknisk-forskrift---tek/
Avvik: 95 | Bestått: 102
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--facebook" href="https://www.facebook.com/ebaentrepre
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (92 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MSR5PN2&content.type.id=33&content.link=744182&content.category=&content.type.category=1377&content.tags=" s
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search-comp__inputfield" id="search-input-header" name="q" placeholder="Søk..." type="search" value=""/>
